message_text: MT5 keeps disconnecting from my account randomly during trading hours.
The trading bot ran an infinite loop and drained my balance before I caught it.
Really appreciate the live chat feature, resolved my query instantly.
The premium tier benefits don't feel any different from standard honestly.
The bot stopped executing my strategy overnight, no error shown anywhere.
Platform fees seem to have increased without any clear notice.
Verification process was surprisingly fast this time, thank you.
My account got flagged for KYC again even though I submitted documents twice.
Support agent was rude and dismissive when I asked for a refund.
Spread widened massively during news events, cost me a lot on that trade.
Bot editor is glitchy, my code disappears sometimes when I switch tabs.
Had a delay of almost a minute on trade execution during high volatility.
My trades keep getting delayed by several seconds, I'm losing money on slippage.
I keep getting logged out of MT5 for no reason, very annoying.
Great job on the recent platform update, feels much faster now.
I had to explain my issue to three different agents, very frustrating experience.
Fast, smooth, no issues to report this week.
Withdrawal finally went through but took much longer than advertised.
The mobile app crashed right when I had an open position, lost the trade.
Deriv Bot keeps giving syntax errors on a strategy that worked fine last week.
My VIP account manager hasn't responded to my email in over a week.
Really impressed with the new charting tools, much better than before.
